stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP698 file 3.6.
Mass: 4300 lb
Headwind: 25 kt
Temperature: 28°C
Pressure Altitude: 3000 ft

Given the following parameters, determine the all engine and the engine out Rate Of Climb RoC.

options.a: All engine ROC = 1219 fpm and engine out RoC = 240 fpm.
options.b: All engine ROC = 2130 fpm and engine out RoC = 419 fpm.
options.c: All engine ROC = 1675 fpm and engine out RoC = 330 fpm.
options.d: All engine ROC = 1450 fpm and engine out RoC = 215 fpm.
